name: desync_on_sfn_wrap
description: Unsigned 32-bit arithmetic for (current - last) on SFN wrap per spec. Triggers desync recovery state machine. Independent oracle from 02a-coordinated-capacity.md:325 and 09-packets-timing.md:250.

name: multi_root_version_conflict_desync
description: Conflicting DIO version from secondary root forces desync to avoid routing loops (RPL non-storing mode).

name: excessive_clock_drift_desync
description: Drift exceeding guard after beacon arrival triggers desync_recovery() and epoch_floor revalidation per spec timing rules.

name: desync_recovery_beacon_revalidate
description: After desync, first valid beacon resets state; test vector for recovery transition.
